text.title: Voice Implementation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes voice-agent task to the right stack + VAD based on latency budget, privacy, and environment.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the task need a multi-turn conversational voice loop?

branch.question: Microphone environment is a silent recording booth?

text.example: needs_conversational_loop=true → latency_budget_ms=2500 → environment=office → r1-silero-vad (use Silero VAD, chain stack).
